mitre_techniques.name: Email Collection: Remote Email Collection
mitre_techniques.best_kql:
SigninLogs
| where AppDisplayName == "Microsoft Exchange"
| where AuthenticationRequirement == "1"
| where City == "Redmond"
| where ResultType == 0

mitre_techniques.name: Data from Cloud Storage
mitre_techniques.best_kql:
Data | where ObjectId has_any (
        '/subscriptions/23456789-8901-2345-6789-012345678901/resourceGroups/default/resourceProviders/Microsoft.Storage',
        '/subscriptions/34567890-9012-3456-7890-123456789012/resourceGroups/default/resourceProviders/Microsoft.Storage',
        '/subscriptions/45678901-2345-6789-0123-456789012345/resourceGroups/default/resourceProviders/Microsoft.Storage'
    ) and
    where AuthenticationRequirement == 2 or
    where UserAgent has_any (
        "python-requests/",
        "Go-http-client/",
        "curl/",
        "libwww-perl/",
        "masscan/",
        "zgrab/",
        "nmap scripting engine",
        "sqlmap/",
        "nikto/",
        "dirbuster",
        "gobuster",
        "nuclei/",
        "httpx/",
        "wfuzz/",
        "ffuf/"
    ) and
    where ResultType == 0

mitre_techniques.name: Network Sniffing
mitre_techniques.best_kql:
SigninLogs
| where ResultType == 0
| where IPAddress in ("162.243.103.246", "50.16.16.211", "34.204.119.63", "178.62.3.223", "27.133.154.218")
| where UserAgent has_any ("python-requests/", "Go-http-client/", "curl/", "libwww-perl/", "masscan/", "zgrab/", "nmap scripting engine", "sqlmap/", "nikto/", "dirbuster", "gobuster", "nuclei/", "httpx/", "wfuzz/", "ffuf/")

mitre_techniques.name: Brute Force: Password Spraying
mitre_techniques.best_kql: `AppDisplayName in ~"Microsoft Outlook|Excel|Word|Intune|Azure AD Graph" and AuthenticationRequirement == "MFA" and ClientAppUsed == "Microsoft Authentication Broker" and RiskLevelDuringSignIn == 1 and ConditionalAccessStatus == "NotApplicable" and CountryOrRegion == "United States" and ResultType == 0`

mitre_techniques.name: Steal Application Access Token
mitre_techniques.best_kql: where IPAddress in ("162.243.103.246", "50.16.16.211", "34.204.119.63", "178.62.3.223", "27.133.154.218") or UserAgent has_any ("python-requests/", "Go-http-client/", "curl/", "libwww-perl/", "masscan/", "zgrab/", "nmap scripting engine", "sqlmap/", "nikto/", "dirbuster", "gobuster", "nuclei/", "httpx/", "wfuzz/", "ffuf/") and AuthenticationRequirement != 1 and ClientAppUsed != "Microsoft Edge" and AppDisplayName != "Office 365" and RiskLevelDuringSignIn != 0 and ConditionalAccessStatus != "Work account" and CountryOrRegion != "US" and ResultType == 0

mitre_techniques.name: Modify Authentication Process: Multi-Factor Authentication
mitre_techniques.best_kql:
AzureActiveDirectory | where AuthenticationRequirement == 'multiFactorAuthentication'
                      and ClientAppUsed == 'Azure AD'
                      and ConditionalAccessStatus == 'success'
                      and (CountryOrRegion == 'USA' or City != 'New York')
                      and RiskLevelDuringSignIn > 1
                      and ResultType == 0

mitre_techniques.name: Forge Web Credentials: SAML Tokens
mitre_techniques.best_kql:
where IPAddress in ("162.243.103.246", "50.16.16.211", "34.204.119.63", "178.62.3.223", "27.133.154.218")
and UserAgent has_any ("python-requests/", "Go-http-client/", "curl/", "libwww-perl/", "masscan/", "zgrab/", "nmap scripting engine", "sqlmap/", "nikto/", "dirbuster", "gobuster", "nuclei/", "httpx/", "wfuzz/", "ffuf/")
and AuthenticationRequirement != 2
or ClientAppUsed != "Office365Web"
or AppDisplayName not in ("SharePoint Online", "OneDrive for Business", "Teams", "Azure Information Protection", "Power BI Embedded", "Office 365")
or RiskLevelDuringSignIn != 1
or ConditionalAccessStatus != 1
or CountryOrRegion != "United States"

mitre_techniques.name: Multi-Factor Authentication Request Generation
mitre_techniques.best_kql: where IPAddress in ("162.243.103.246", "50.16.16.211", "34.204.119.63", "178.62.3.223", "27.133.154.218") and UserAgent has_any ("python-requests/", "Go-http-client/", "curl/", "libwww-perl/", "masscan/", "zgrab/", "nmap scripting engine", "sqlmap/", "nikto/", "dirbuster", "gobuster", "nuclei/", "httpx/", "wfuzz/", "ffuf/") and ResultType == 0 and AuthenticationRequirement != "MFA" and ClientAppUsed != "Phone Call" and ConditionalAccessStatus != "Blocked" and CountryOrRegion != "US"

mitre_techniques.name: Valid Accounts: Default Accounts
mitre_techniques.best_kql: where `IPAddress` in ("216.58.194.174") and `AuthenticationRequirement` in (2) and `ClientAppUsed` == "client_credentials" and `AppDisplayName` == "Azure AD Sync Service" and `RiskLevelDuringSignIn` == 0 and `ConditionalAccessStatus` == 1 and `CountryOrRegion` == "USA" and `UserAgent` has_any ("python-requests/", "Go-http-client/", "curl/", "libwww-perl/", "masscan/", "zgrab/", "nmap scripting engine", "sqlmap/", "nikto/", "dirbuster", "gobuster", "nuclei/", "httpx/", "wfuzz/", "ffuf/") or `IPAddress` in ("162.243.103.246", "50.16.16.211", "34.204.119.63", "178.62.3.223", "27.133.154.218")

mitre_techniques.name: Valid Accounts: Cloud Accounts
mitre_techniques.best_kql:
Signins
| where AuthenticationRequirement == 2 or ClientAppUsed == "" or AppDisplayName == "Azure Resource Manager (ARM)" or RiskLevelDuringSignIn == 1 or ConditionalAccessStatus == 2 or CountryOrRegion == "US" or UserAgent has_any ("python-requests/", "Go-http-client/", "curl/", "libwww-perl/", "masscan/", "zgrab/", "nmap scripting engine", "sqlmap/", "nikto/", "dirbuster", "gobuster", "nuclei/", "httpx/", "wfuzz/", "ffuf/")

mitre_techniques.name: Use Alternate Authentication Material: Application Access Token

SigninLogs

| where UserAgent has_any ("python-requests/2.28.0", "Go-http-client/", "curl/", "libwww-perl/", "masscan/", "zgrab/", "nmap scripting engine", "sqlmap/", "nikto/", "dirbuster", "gobuster", "nuclei/", "httpx/", "wfuzz/", "ffuf/")
| where IPAddress in ("162.243.103.246", "50.16.16.211", "34.204.119.63", "178.62.3.223", "27.133.154.218")

mitre_techniques.name: Impair Defenses: Disable or Modify Tools
mitre_techniques.best_kql:
| where UserAgent has_any ("python-requests/2.28.0") and
  AuthenticationRequirement != "multi-factor" and
  ClientAppUsed != "Microsoft Online Services" and
  AppDisplayName == "Microsoft Azure Portal" and
  RiskLevelDuringSignIn == "none" and
  ConditionalAccessStatus != "on" and
  CountryOrRegion != "US"
